requirement_topic.en: IMDA Equipment Type Approval and Registration

summary.en: All radio communications equipment and telecommunications terminal equipment sold or imported into Singapore must be registered with IMDA under the Telecommunications Act (Cap. 323) and the Radio Communications Act (Cap. 270). The IMDA registration number must appear on the product label and packaging before import or sale. No mutual recognition agreement exists between Singapore and any jurisdiction for IMDA registration.
summary.zh: 所有在新加坡销售或进口的无线电通信设备及电信终端设备，须依据《电信法》（第323章）及《无线电通信法》（第270章）向IMDA完成注册。产品标签及包装上须标注IMDA注册号，方可进口或销售。新加坡与任何司法管辖区之间，均不存在涉及IMDA注册的相互认可协议。
summary.zht: 所有在新加坡銷售或進口的無線電通訊設備及電信終端設備，須依據《電信法》（第323章）及《無線電通訊法》（第270章）向IMDA完成登記。產品標籤及包裝上須標注IMDA登記號碼，方可進口或銷售。新加坡與任何司法管轄區之間，均不存在涉及IMDA登記的相互認可協議。

summary.en: China MIIT/SRRC radio type approval (型式核准) for RF/wireless equipment; MIIT network access license (NAL / 进网许可证) for telecommunications terminal equipment sold in China; CCC certification (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable product categories. GB standards (GB/T 9254 EMC, GB 4943.1 safety) underpin technical compliance.
summary.zh: 中国工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）无线电设备型式核准（适用于无线/射频设备）；工信部电信终端设备进网许可证（NAL）；适用产品类别的CCC认证（中国强制认证）。GB标准（GB/T 9254电磁兼容、GB 4943.1安全）构成技术合规基础。
summary.zht: 中國工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）無線電設備型式核准（適用於無線/射頻設備）；工信部電信終端設備進網許可（NAL）；適用產品類別的CCC認證（中國強制認證）。GB標準（GB/T 9254電磁相容、GB 4943.1安全）構成技術合規基礎。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval Regulations (China)
MIIT Network Access License (进网许可证) (China)

gap.en: IMDA registration is a standalone mandatory requirement with no mutual recognition of SRRC, MIIT NAL, or CCC. The IMDA registration number must appear on the physical product and packaging. Singapore enforces this requirement at the point of import and sale. A fresh IMDA type approval/registration application must be submitted for each product model. CCC is explicitly not recognised by IMDA.
gap.zh: IMDA注册为独立强制要求，不承认SRRC、工信部NAL或CCC。产品实体及包装须标注IMDA注册号。新加坡在进口及销售环节均执行此要求。每个产品型号均须单独提交IMDA型式认可/注册申请。CCC明确不被IMDA承认。
gap.zht: IMDA登記為獨立強制要求，不承認SRRC、工信部NAL或CCC。產品實體及包裝須標注IMDA登記號碼。新加坡在進口及銷售環節均執行此要求。每個產品型號均須單獨提交IMDA型式認可/登記申請。CCC明確不被IMDA承認。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IMDA equipment registration is mandatory before any import or sale in Singapore. SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC have no legal equivalence under Singapore law and cannot substitute for IMDA registration. The IMDA registration number must appear on the product label and packaging.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IMDA设备注册是在新加坡进口或销售前的强制要求。SRRC、工信部NAL及CCC在新加坡法律框架下不具备等同效力，不能替代IMDA注册。产品标签及包装须标注IMDA注册号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IMDA設備登記是在新加坡進口或銷售前的強制要求。SRRC、工信部NAL及CCC在新加坡法律框架下不具備等同效力，不能替代IMDA登記。產品標籤及包裝須標注IMDA登記號碼。
